nameMeanings.name: Luss
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: from a short form of the old personal name Duso, Tuzzo. This surname is rare in Germany.
Hungarian: unexplained. This surname is rare in Hungary.

nameMeanings.name: Godfrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Old French name Godefroy, which is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from god ‘god’ (or gōd ‘good’) + fred, frid ‘peace’. This was adopted by the Normans, and brought to England by immigrants from the Low Countries and France. It was borne by a Norman saint ( c.1066–1115 ) who became bishop of Amiens. There has been considerable confusion with Geoffrey .

en.lifeSummary: Mrs Godriful Godfrey Luss was born about 1290, in Scotland. She had at least 1 daughter with Godriful Godfrey Luss.
